scripts.a11y:smoke: astro build && start-server-and-test 'astro preview --port 4321' http://localhost:4321 'pa11y-ci --config pa11y/smoke.json'
scripts.a11y:full: SITE_URL=http://localhost:4321 astro build && start-server-and-test 'astro preview --port 4321' http://localhost:4321 'pa11y-ci --config pa11y/full.json --sitemap http://localhost:4321/sitemap-0.xml'
